problem id: 3ebd80e6
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(5) AND NOT SHR(7)) XOR NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  01111111 -> 10010000
  00001001 -> 01011110
  10010011 -> 00001101
  01001011 -> 00010110
  10001001 -> 01001111
  11100001 -> 01000011
  11101000 -> 11100011
  11100111 -> 10000011
  01011110 -> 00110100

query: 00101011
predicted answer: 00011010
